title: Communauté d'agglomération du Caudrésis et du Catésis
summary: Communauté d'agglomération du Caudrésis et du Catésis is the communauté d'agglomération, an intercommunal structure, centred on the towns of Caudry and Le Cateau-Cambrésis. It is located in the Nord department, in the Hauts-de-France region, northern France. Created in 2011, its seat is in Beauvois-en-Cambrésis. Its area is 372.7 km2. Its population was 64,124 in 2019, of which 14,121 in Caudry.
text:
Communauté d'agglomération du Caudrésis et du Catésis is the communauté d'agglomération, an intercommunal structure, centred on the towns of Caudry and Le Cateau-Cambrésis. It is located in the Nord department, in the Hauts-de-France region, northern France. Created in 2011, its seat is in Beauvois-en-Cambrésis. Its area is 372.7 km2. Its population was 64,124 in 2019, of which 14,121 in Caudry.

Composition
The communauté d'agglomération consists of the following 46 communes:
